title: Manikeshwari Temple
tagline: Manikeshwari Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Manikeshwari Temple is located in Kalahandi district of Odisha, India.
overview.description: Manikeshwari Temple is located in Kalahandi district of Odisha, India. The temple is located to the south of odisha. The main deity here is Goddess Manikeshwari. She is the Ishta Devi of Nagavanshi Khyatriya's.

topPlaces.name: Bhawanipatna
topPlaces.description: Bhawanipatna is a town and the headquarter of Kalahandi district in the state of Odisha, India. Bhawanipatna has numerous temples dedicated to different deities of the Hindu pantheon.

items.note: Bhawanipatna is a town and the headquarter of Kalahandi district in the state of Odisha, India. Bhawanipatna has numerous temples dedicated to different deities of the Hindu pantheon.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Manikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Manikeshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Manikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (206 km) and the nearest railway station is Sambalpur Junction (193 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Manikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Manikeshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Manikeshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Manikeshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
